expectations.text: Button uses CVA with a 'warning' variant defined
expectations.evidence: Lines 18-19: warning variant defined in CVA variants object

expectations.text: Warning variant uses yellow or amber Tailwind CSS classes
expectations.evidence: Line 19: bg-warning/10 text-warning-foreground - uses CSS variable-based warning colors (oklch pattern from skill)

expectations.text: Uses cn() utility for class merging
expectations.evidence: Line 7: import { cn } from '@/lib/utils/ui-utils', used in Button and ButtonGroup

expectations.text: Dialog uses AlertDialog or Dialog components from @/components/ui/
Uses render prop instead of asChild (Base UI pattern)
expectations.evidence: Lines 48, 60: render={<Button variant='warning' />} on AlertDialogTrigger and AlertDialogAction
